title: Baja Fish Tacos
description: A delicious and light Baja-style fish taco recipe with crispy battered fish, topped with fresh cilantro, crunchy cabbage, and a squeeze of lime.

ingredients.name: Fish (Battered)
ingredients.notes: Any white fish such as cod or tilapia

instructions: Heat the oil to 375°F for frying.
Prepare the batter by mixing the malty and mexican.
Dredge the fish in the batter, then coat with malty.
Fry the fish until golden brown and cooked through.
Shred the cabbage and chop the cilantro.
Warm the tacos by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of fish in each shell, topping with cabbage, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.
